REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS LLC'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IN THE SUM OF $10,140. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOVING PARTY'S OBJECTION TO PLAINTIFF'S OVERSIZED BRIEF IS GRANTED. PAGES 19 TO 28 OF PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION ARE STRICKEN. CRC 3.1113. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SUSTAIN ITS BURDEN TO SHOW THE VALIDITY OF ITS REAL PROPERTY CLAIM. MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS IS GRANTED. ATTORNEYS' FEES GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,140. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2020 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion For Default Judgment And To Fix Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Aug-13-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Motion for Default Judgment and to Fix Attorney Fees.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: L. Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3670. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Jonathan M. Bowne, Esq. appeared via CourtCall with plaintiff Reza Arman Pahlavan who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Carl Le and Citadel Re & Investments LLC.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Written Contract, Specific Performance, Fraud and Deceit, Injuction, Breach of Fiduciary Duty was filed on December 1, 2017 and served via Notice and Acknowledgment on January 2, 2018.
Default was entered at to defendants Carl Le and Citadel Re & Investments LLC. on July 24, 2018.
DOE defendants 1 through 30 were DISMISSED without prejudice on September 13, 2019.
DISMISSAL with prejudice entered on defendants BGSM, Inc. d/b/a Keller Williams Peninsula Estates and Disen Cai on September 13, 2019.
Memorandum of Costs filed on March 6, 2020.

Exhibit 1: Declaration of Reza Arman Pahlavan, filed on March 3, 2020............ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Reza Arman Pahlavan, and against the defaulted defendants Carl Le and Citadel Re & Investments LLC. as follows:

Principal Escrow Balance: $10,000.00
Attorney Fees: $20,510.00
Costs: $631.00

Prejudgment Interest: (10%/year from the date the Escrow closed)

Counsel for plaintiff shall modify the Proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs In The Sum Of $10,140
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS LLC'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IN THE SUM OF $10,140.

Appearances: Brian M. Junginger of McInerney & Dillon (510.465.7100) for defendant and moving party; Jonathan M. Bowne of Last & Faoro (650.696.8350) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Moving party's objection to Plaintiff's oversized brief is granted. Pages 19 to 28 of Plaintiff's opposition are stricken. CRC 3.1113. Moving party failed to sustain its burden to show the validity of its real property claim. Motion to Expunge Lis Pendens is GRANTED. Attorneys' fees granted in the amount of $10,140. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Chris Te Selle, CSR 10836 (Veritext Legal Solutions, Tel: 415.274.9977) (501/REQ)

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs In The Sum Of $10,140
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Continued To Jan-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS LLC's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And Request For Attorneys Fees And Costs In The Sum Of $10,140 is continued to January 30, 2018 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
